text:
The coverage gap is technically referred to as 
the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. Plans that use a co-payment amount rather than a 
coinsurance percentage will not have a value in this field; reference instead the corresponding co-
payment variable called (GAP_INPP_COPAY_OS). 

The CCW constructs the Plan Characteristics file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors 
to CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive
